GFA0FR-EN: GF fire alarm button, no camera. Polycarbonate, red. Push to activate, key to reset. No shield. SPDT (Form C), 30 VAC/VDC @ 5 A. 105×138×38 mm (W×H×D). Flush/surface mount, requires KIT-GFA-BB. Mounting plate included. Marking: FIRE.

GFC0FR-EN: GF fire alarm button, 5 MP camera. Polycarbonate, red. Push to activate, key to reset. No shield. SPDT (Form C), 24 VAC/VDC @ 2 A. Camera relay 24 VAC/DC @ 2 A.
